column1: btech_mbbs,"MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery) 🩺
column2: MBBS","1️⃣ **MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery)** 🩺

column1: MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery) is a 5.5-year undergraduate medical degree that trains students to become professional doctors.

The course focuses on human anatomy, diseases, diagnosis, treatment, surgery, and patient care. After completing MBBS, graduates can work as medical doctors in hospitals, clinics, and healthcare institutions.
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

MBBS is the most popular medical degree for students who want to become doctors. After completing MBBS and specialization, graduates can work in hospitals, clinics, research centers, or start their own medical practice.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) is a 5-year undergraduate dental course that focuses on oral health, dental surgery, teeth problems, and dental care.
Students learn about dental anatomy, oral diseases, dental surgery, orthodontics, and dental treatments used to treat teeth and gum problems.
• Tamil Nadu Government Dental College and Hospital
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

BDS is the main dental degree for students interested in oral healthcare and dental surgery. Graduates work as dentists in hospitals, dental clinics, or start their own dental practice.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_bams,"BAMS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery) 🌿
column2: BAMS","1️⃣ **BAMS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery)** 🌿

column1: BAMS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery) is a 5.5-year undergraduate medical course that focuses on Ayurveda, the traditional Indian system of medicine.
Students learn about herbal medicine, natural treatments, body balance (doshas), and Ayurvedic therapies used for treating diseases.

BAMS is ideal for students interested in traditional medicine and natural healing systems. Graduates can work as Ayurvedic doctors in hospitals, wellness centers, or open their own Ayurvedic clinic.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_bhms,"BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery) 💊
column2: BHMS","1️⃣ **BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery)** 💊

column1: BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery) is a 5.5-year undergraduate medical degree that focuses on homeopathy, a natural system of medicine that treats diseases using highly diluted substances.
Students learn about homeopathic remedies, disease diagnosis, natural healing methods, and patient care.

BHMS is suitable for students interested in natural medicine and holistic healthcare. Graduates can work as homeopathic doctors in hospitals, clinics, or open their own practice.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_bums,"BUMS (Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery) 🌱
column2: BUMS","1️⃣ **BUMS (Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery)** 🌱

column1: BUMS (Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery) is a 5.5-year undergraduate medical course that focuses on Unani medicine, a traditional healing system based on natural remedies and lifestyle management.
Students learn about herbal medicines, natural therapies, disease diagnosis, and holistic treatment methods.
• Aligarh Muslim University Faculty of Unani Medicine

BUMS is suitable for students interested in traditional herbal medicine and holistic healthcare systems. Graduates can work in Unani hospitals, wellness centers, research institutions, or start their own clinic.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_bsms,"BSMS (Bachelor of Siddha Medicine and Surgery) 🌿
column2: BSMS","1️⃣ **BSMS (Bachelor of Siddha Medicine and Surgery)** 🌿

column1: BSMS (Bachelor of Siddha Medicine and Surgery) is a 5.5-year undergraduate medical course that focuses on Siddha medicine, one of the oldest traditional medical systems in India, mainly practiced in Tamil Nadu.
Students learn about herbal medicines, natural healing methods, body balance, and traditional therapies used to treat various diseases.

BSMS is suitable for students interested in traditional Tamil medical systems and herbal medicine. Graduates can work as Siddha doctors in hospitals, wellness centers, research institutions, or open their own clinic.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_bvsc,"B.V.Sc & AH (Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry) 🐄
column2: B.V.Sc & AH","1️⃣ **B.V.Sc & AH (Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry)** 🐄

column1: B.V.Sc & AH (Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry) is a 5.5-year undergraduate medical course that focuses on animal healthcare, veterinary medicine, and animal disease treatment.
Students learn about animal anatomy, veterinary surgery, animal nutrition, and livestock management.
• Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University
• Veterinary College and Research Institute Namakkal

B.V.Sc & AH is ideal for students interested in animal healthcare and veterinary medicine. Graduates can work in veterinary hospitals, animal farms, research institutions, or government animal health departments.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: BPT (Bachelor of Physiotherapy) is a 4.5-year undergraduate healthcare course that focuses on physical rehabilitation, movement therapy, and injury recovery.
Students learn about human body movement, exercise therapy, rehabilitation techniques, and treatment of physical injuries without surgery or medicines.

column3: Some colleges may accept National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET), but many admit based on 12th marks

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences
• Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research

BPT is ideal for students interested in physical therapy, rehabilitation, and injury treatment. Graduates work in hospitals, rehabilitation centers, sports teams, and physiotherapy clinics.",NEET Required Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: Bachelor of Occupational Therapy (BOT) is a 4.5-year undergraduate healthcare course that focuses on helping people recover from physical, mental, or neurological disabilities through therapy and rehabilitation.
Students learn how to help patients improve daily life activities, motor skills, and independence after injuries, illness, or disabilities.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences

column3: Helping patients regain daily life skills

column1: BOT is ideal for students interested in rehabilitation and helping people recover from disabilities. Graduates work in hospitals, rehabilitation centers, special schools, and healthcare institutions.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: Bachelor of Science in Biotechnology is a 3-year undergraduate science degree that focuses on biological science and technology used in medicine, agriculture, genetics, and pharmaceuticals.
Students learn about genetics, microbiology, molecular biology, and laboratory research techniques.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology

column3: Checking product quality in biotech industries

column1: BSc Biotechnology is ideal for students interested in genetics, laboratory research, and biotechnology industries. Graduates can work in biotech companies, research labs, pharmaceutical industries, and agriculture biotechnology sectors.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_biomedical,"Bachelor of Technology in Biomedical Engineering ⚙️
column2: Biomedical Engineering","1️⃣ **Bachelor of Technology in Biomedical Engineering** ⚙️

column1: Bachelor of Technology in Biomedical Engineering is a 4-year undergraduate engineering course that combines engineering and medical sciences to develop medical devices and healthcare technologies.
Students learn about medical equipment, biomedical instruments, medical imaging systems, and healthcare technology used in hospitals and research labs.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required (engineering entrance or 12th marks)

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology

BTech Biomedical Engineering is ideal for students interested in medical technology, healthcare devices, and engineering applications in medicine. Graduates work in hospitals, medical device companies, research labs, and healthcare industries.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: Bachelor of Science in Microbiology is a 3-year undergraduate science degree that focuses on microorganisms such as bacteria, viruses, fungi, and their role in health, environment, and industry.
Students learn about microbial diseases, laboratory techniques, food microbiology, and biotechnology applications.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology

column3: Working in food and pharma industries

column1: BSc Microbiology is ideal for students interested in microorganisms, laboratory research, and biotechnology fields. Graduates work in research laboratories, pharmaceutical companies, food industries, and healthcare sectors.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_cardiac,"Bachelor of Science in Cardiac Technology ❤️
column2: Cardiac Technology","1️⃣ **Bachelor of Science in Cardiac Technology** ❤️

column1: Bachelor of Science in Cardiac Technology is a 3–4 year undergraduate allied health science course that focuses on heart-related diagnostic tests, cardiac care, and cardiovascular technology.
Students learn how to assist doctors in heart monitoring, ECG tests, cardiac procedures, and operation of cardiac medical equipment used in hospitals.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences

BSc Cardiac Technology is suitable for students interested in heart healthcare and cardiovascular diagnostic technology. Graduates work in cardiology departments, hospitals, and cardiac diagnostic centers.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: Bachelor of Respiratory Therapy is a 3–4 year undergraduate allied health science course that focuses on lung health, breathing disorders, and respiratory care.
Students learn how to assist doctors in treating patients with breathing problems such as asthma, lung infections, and respiratory failure.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • Operation of ventilators and breathing machines
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences

Bachelor of Respiratory Therapy is ideal for students interested in lung health and respiratory care. Graduates work in hospitals, ICU units, pulmonary clinics, and emergency care departments.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: Bachelor in Psychology is a 3-year undergraduate degree that focuses on human behavior, mental health, emotions, and cognitive processes.
Students learn how the human mind works, how people think, feel, and behave, and how psychological principles are used in healthcare, education, and counseling.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology

column3: Helping people with mental health issues

column1: Bachelor in Psychology is ideal for students interested in mental health, human behavior, and counseling. Graduates work in schools, hospitals, counseling centers, research institutions, and corporate organizations.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_healthcare_mgmt,"Bachelor of Arts in Healthcare Management 🏥
column2: Healthcare Management","1️⃣ **Bachelor of Arts in Healthcare Management** 🏥

column1: Bachelor of Arts in Healthcare Management is a 3-year undergraduate program that focuses on hospital administration, healthcare services management, and medical facility operations.
Students learn how to manage hospitals, healthcare staff, medical records, and healthcare services efficiently.

column3: Usually No National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) required

column1: • SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences

Bachelor of Arts in Healthcare Management is suitable for students interested in hospital administration and healthcare management. Graduates work in hospitals, healthcare organizations, insurance companies, and public health departments.",Medical / Healthcare Courses (Usually Without NEET)

column1: allied_health_nav,"Allied Health Science / Paramedical Degree Courses (3–4 Years)","3️⃣ **Allied Health Science / Paramedical Degree Courses (3–4 Years)**
B.Sc. Nursing is a 4-year undergraduate degree that prepares students to become professional nurses. It focuses on patient care, clinical assistance, health promotion, and community healthcare.
Students learn about anatomy, physiology, nutrition, pediatric nursing, obstetric nursing, and surgical nursing to provide comprehensive bedside care and support for doctors and patients.

column3: Required by some top colleges/universities (e.g., AIIMS, CMC, JIPMER, or NEET for some states)

column1: • Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

B.Sc. Nursing is one of the most stable and respected careers in healthcare. Graduates play a critical role in patient recovery and healthcare management in hospitals, research centers, and international healthcare institutions.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) is a 3-year undergraduate degree that focuses on laboratory investigations used for diagnosis and treatment of diseases.
Students learn about blood testing, biochemistry, microbiology, pathology, and clinical lab techniques. It is essential for medical diagnosis and health monitoring.
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences

B.Sc. MLT is a high-demand course for students interested in medical diagnosis and laboratory sciences. Graduates work in hospitals, diagnostic centers, research laboratories, and blood banks.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: B.Sc. Radiology & Imaging Technology is a 3–4 year undergraduate degree that focuses on medical imaging techniques like X-rays, MRI, CT scans, and Ultrasound used to diagnose diseases and injuries.
Students learn how to operate advanced medical imaging equipment, analyze scan results, and assist doctors in medical diagnosis.
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology

B.Sc. Radiology & Imaging Technology is a specialized healthcare career with excellent job prospects in hospitals and diagnostic centers. Graduates play a vital role in disease diagnosis through advanced imaging.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional
Anesthesia Technology","1️⃣ **B.Sc. Operation Theatre & Anesthesia Technology** 😷

column1: B.Sc. Operation Theorem and Anesthesia Technology is a 3–4 year undergraduate degree that trains students to assist surgeons and anesthesiologists during surgical procedures and operation theatre management.
Students learn about anesthesia equipment, surgical instruments, sterilization processes, and patient care before, during, and after surgery.
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research

B.Sc. OT & Anesthesia Technology is ideal for students interested in surgical care and intensive care units. Graduates are highly essential for the successful completion of surgeries in hospitals.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: B.Sc. Physician Assistant is a 3-year undergraduate course that trains students to work as mid-level healthcare providers who assist doctors and surgeons in patient care, diagnosis, and treatment.
Students learn to perform clinical examinations, assist in surgeries, manage patient records, and recommend diagnostic tests under the supervision of a physician.
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

B.Sc. Physician Assistant is a great choice for students who want to work closely with doctors in patient care and clinical practice. It offers high job roles in modern hospitals and multispecialty centers.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: B.Sc. Dialysis Technology is a 3-year undergraduate degree that focuses on the treatment of patients with kidney failure through dialysis procedures.
Students learn about renal anatomy, dialysis equipment, patient monitoring, and technical aspects of kidney replacement therapy. It is critical for treating chronic kidney diseases.
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

B.Sc. Dialysis Technology is a highly specialized healthcare field. Graduates work in hospitals, dialysis centers, and renal specialty clinics, playing a vital role in life-saving kidney treatments.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: B.Sc. Optometry is a 4-year undergraduate degree that focuses on eye healthcare, vision testing, and corrective eye treatments like glasses, contact lenses, and eye exercises.
Students learn about the anatomy of the eye, vision disorders, ophthalmic instruments, and diagnostic methods used to identify eye problems and improve vision.
• Fitting contact lenses and low vision aids
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology

B.Sc. Optometry is an excellent career for students interested in vision sciences and eye care. Graduates work in hospitals, eye clinics, optical industries, and can also start their own optometry practice.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: B.Sc. Perfusion Technology is a 3-year undergraduate degree that focuses on the study of the heart-lung machine and its use during open-heart surgery and critical care.
Students learn how to operate the heart-lung machine to maintain blood circulation and oxygenation for patients during complex surgical procedures.
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

B.Sc. Perfusion Technology is a high-specialty course for students interested in cardiac surgery and critical care technology. Graduates work in operation theatres alongside cardiac surgeons.",Allied Health Science / Paramedical
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: diploma_medical_nav,"Diploma Medical Courses (2–3 Years)","4️⃣ **Diploma Medical Courses (2–3 Years)**
• Diploma in Operation Theatre & Anesthesia Technology (DOT&AT) 😷
• Diploma in Ophthalmic Technology (DOT) 👁️",Diploma in Nursing (GNM)
GNM (General Nursing and Midwifery) is a 3-year diploma course that focuses on general nursing care and midwifery services in hospitals and healthcare centers.
Students learn about bedside nursing, community health, child health nursing, and midwifery to assist doctors and provide patient care.

GNM is a practical and job-oriented nursing diploma, ideal for students who want to enter the healthcare field quickly. It provides strong clinical skills and ample job opportunities in both government and private hospitals.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: DMLT is a 2-year diploma course that focuses on the techniques and procedures used in medical laboratories for disease diagnosis and health monitoring.
Students learn about testing blood, urine, stool, and other body fluids, as well as handling laboratory instruments and maintaining lab safety.
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology

DMLT is a vocational healthcare course that provides quick entry into the medical diagnosis field. Graduates work in hospitals and private diagnostic centers as lab technicians.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: DRIT is a 2-year diploma course that focuses on the operation of radiographic equipment like X-rays, MRI, and CT scan machines to help in medical diagnosis.
Students learn about radiation physics, image processing, patient positioning, and safety protocols for handling radioactive equipment.
• Image Processing and Dark Room Techniques
• SRM Institute of Science and Technology

DRIT is a specialized diploma that allows students to work as radiology technicians in hospitals and imaging centers. It is a technical role essential for modern medical diagnosis.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: btech_dot_at,"Diploma in Operation Theatre & Anesthesia Technology (DOT&AT) 😷
column2: DOT&AT","1️⃣ **Diploma in Operation Theatre & Anesthesia Technology (DOT&AT)** 😷

column1: DOT&AT is a 2-year diploma course designed to train students in managing operation theatres and assisting anesthesiologists and surgeons during surgical procedures.
Students learn about OT equipment, sterilization techniques, anesthesia drugs, and surgical instrument management to ensure a safe surgical environment.

column3: Maintaining operation theatre and assisting surgery

column1: DOT&AT is a critical healthcare diploma for students who want to work in surgery and life-saving units. Graduates are vital members of the surgical team in hospitals.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: D.Pharm is a 2-year diploma program that focuses on basic pharmaceutical science, drug manufacturing, distribution, and medication dispensing.
Students learn about drug chemistry, pharmacy rules, pharmacology, and clinical pharmacy to work as pharmacists or in the pharmaceutical industry.

D.Pharm is a highly sought-after professional diploma. It provides a license to work as a pharmacist and start a drug store, with huge demand in both the retail and industrial sectors.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: DMRS is a 1–2 year diploma course that focuses on the management of patient healthcare records, medical coding, and hospital statistics.
Students learn how to organize, store, and analyze medical data, which is essential for hospital administration, research, and legal documentation.
• Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research

DMRS is an administrative healthcare role ideal for students interested in hospital management and medical data. It is a vital back-office function in all large-scale hospitals.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: The Health Inspector diploma is a 1–2 year course designed to train students in public health management, sanitation, and disease control.
Students learn about community health, hygiene standards, epidemic monitoring, and environmental safety to work in government health departments and municipalities.

column3: Managing waste and hygiene in cities

column1: The Health Inspector course is a great entry point for students who want to work in community health and government service. It is a critical role in preventing diseases and maintaining public hygiene.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional

column1: DOT is a 2-year diploma course that focuses on eye care technology, assisting ophthalmologists in vision testing, and surgical procedures related to the eyes.
Students learn to handle eye-testing equipment, assist in cataract surgeries, and provide basic ophthalmic care for patients with vision problems.

DOT is a specialized eye care diploma. Graduates play a key role in assisting eye specialists and are in high demand in hospitals, eye clinics, and charitable visions missions.",Diploma Medical Courses
column2: Become a Doctor or Healthcare Professional
